rows.inputs.query:
[REP]: Hi, thanks for calling Acme Corp support. How can I help you today?
[PROSPECT]: Hi, I'm an end user with your SaaS platform. I wanted to discuss some concerns my team has regarding the recent security update. We're seeing unexpected permission changes, and it's preventing us from accessing key features.
[REP]: Thank you for bringing this to our attention. I apologize for the inconvenience. We are aware of the issue and are working on a patch. Could you share more about the problems you're experiencing?
[PROSPECT]: Our finance team lost access to sensitive reporting, and we're worried about the integrity of our data. We need assurances that this won't happen in the future.
[REP]: I understand your concern. I want to assure you that we've escalated this to our development team and should have a resolution within the next 48 hours. In the meantime, we'll provide temporary workarounds.
[PROSPECT]: Unfortunately, our management has decided to start evaluating alternative platforms due to recurring security issues. Unless there's a permanent fix, we'll need to discontinue.
[REP]: I'm sorry to hear that. We'd appreciate the chance to regain your trust, but I understand your decision. Is there anything else I can help with today?
[PROSPECT]: No, thank you. We'll follow up if needed.

[REP]: Good afternoon, thanks for taking the time to speak with me today. We appreciate Acme Corp's interest in our energy management platform.

[PROSPECT]: Thanks, I'm evaluating platforms for our mid-market facilities. We're already in talks with another vendor, so I'm mainly trying to understand how you differ from them.

[REP]: Absolutely. Could you share which features are most important for your team?

[PROSPECT]: We're focused on real-time analytics and integration with our existing SCADA systems. The other provider has promised seamless integration and a shorter deployment timeline. How does your solution compare?

[REP]: Our platform does support integration, though it typically requires a custom deployment. We offer robust analytics, but I want to be transparent that our timeline is around 3-4 months, depending on requirements.

[PROSPECT]: The competitor quoted us 6 weeks. Also, they're giving us a more flexible pricing structure. Given our limited IT bandwidth, speed is critical.

[REP]: I understand. While our solution is comprehensive, I don't want to overpromise on timeline. Would you like to discuss further or schedule a demo?

[PROSPECT]: I think we'll proceed with the other vendor for now. Your transparency is appreciated, but their offer fits our needs better.

[REP]: Understood. If anything changes or you have future needs, please keep us in mind.

[PROSPECT]: Will do. Thanks again.
